# Stitch Hospitality

> Stitch Hospitality builds The GM Ownership Report OS — an operator-built playbook, workbook, Word template, and prompt library that helps hotel general managers write ownership reports designed for the USALI 12th Revised Edition, effective January 1, 2026.

Built by a sitting hotel general manager who writes this report every month, not a software vendor. The system helps GMs, directors of finance, and ops leads explain performance causally instead of just restating numbers, reconcile year-over-year comparisons after USALI 12's account reclassifications, and pre-empt the questions an owner or asset manager will ask on the monthly call.

## Product

- [The GM Ownership Report OS](https://www.stitchhospitality.com/#pricing) — $29 for the PDF Playbook alone, $99 for the Full OS (Playbook + 8-tab Excel Workbook + Word Report Template + Prompt Library).

## About

- [About Stitch Hospitality](https://www.stitchhospitality.com/about)

## FAQ

- **Is this designed for USALI 12th Revised Edition?** Yes — it's built around the 12th Edition's changes: account reclassifications, expanded labor detail, energy/water/waste reporting, and loyalty-cost treatment. It doesn't reproduce the standard itself; buyers apply their own licensed USALI mappings.
- **I'm not an accountant. Can I use this?** Yes. The playbook is written by a GM for GMs — judgment and narrative, not bookkeeping. The workbook does the calculations from numbers the buyer enters.
- **What's included?** The Full OS ($99) is a PDF playbook, an 8-tab Excel workbook, a Word report template, and a prompt library. The $29 tier is the PDF playbook and worked example only.
- **Do I need any subscription or software?** No. Buyers need Excel (or Sheets/Numbers) and Word. Files are owned outright — no subscription, no lock-in.
- **What's the licensing?** A non-transferable license to use the files internally for a single property — not for redistribution, resale, or multi-property use. Portfolio/management-company licensing available by contacting chris@stitchhospitality.com.
- **What if it's not useful?** 14-day refund, one per customer, void once files have been used in a client-facing or portfolio engagement.

## Compliance note

USALI™ is a trademark of, and is copyrighted by, the Hospitality Financial and Technology Professionals (HFTP). The GM Ownership Report OS is an independent product, not affiliated with, authorized by, or endorsed by HFTP, AHLA, or GFC, and does not reproduce or distribute USALI content.
